welcome.title: Welcome to Bokari
welcome.description: Bokari helps you build a visual budget tree and project your investments over time. Let's take a quick tour!

palette.title: Node Palette
palette.description: Drag nodes from here onto the canvas to build your budget tree. Each color represents a different node type.

canvas.title: Budget Canvas
canvas.description: This is your workspace. Drop nodes here, connect them with edges, and edit values inline to design your budget.

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.description: Switch between the Budget view (build your tree) and Projections (see how investments grow over time).

toolbar.title: Toolbar Actions
toolbar.description: Undo, redo, save, auto-layout, export, and import your budget from here.

help.title: Help
help.description: Open the help drawer anytime for detailed guides. You can also restart this tour from there.

locale.title: Currency & Language
locale.description: Pick your currency and language here. If you haven't customized the example budget, switching language will also swap the template to match.

welcome.title: Welcome to Bokari
welcome.description: Bokari helps you build a visual budget tree and project your investments over time. Let's take a quick tour!

list.title: Your Budget
list.description: Your budget items are listed here as cards. Tap a card to drill into its children, or tap the edit icon to change its values.

addNode.title: Add Nodes
addNode.description: Tap this button to create new nodes. Choose a type and start building your budget tree.

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.description: Switch between Budget (build your tree) and Projections (see how investments grow over time).

moreActions.title: More Actions
moreActions.description: Access undo, redo, save, export, import, and help from this menu.

locale.title: Currency & Language
locale.description: Pick your currency and language here. Switching language on an unmodified template will also swap labels and values to match.

intro.title: Projections
intro.description: This tab shows how your investments could grow over time based on your budget. Let's walk through it!

summary.title: Portfolio Summary
summary.description: A quick overview of your projected portfolio value based on current contributions, returns, and time horizon.

controls.title: Controls
controls.description: Choose a time horizon (5–40 years), switch between a total view and per-asset breakdown, and filter which investments to show.

chart.title: Growth Chart
chart.description: Visualize contributions vs. compound growth over time. The stacked areas show how much comes from what you put in vs. what the market earns you.

scenarios.title: Explore Scenarios
scenarios.description: Adjust monthly contributions to see what-if scenarios. Increase or decrease amounts per asset and watch the chart and summary update instantly.

settings.title: Investment Settings
settings.description: Set the expected annual return for each investment and model income growth over time. These drive the compound growth calculations.

table.title: Yearly Breakdown
table.description: Expand this section for a year-by-year table with exact contribution, growth, and portfolio values.
